news.summary: In Waco, Texas, Samsung and IngenioSpec have reached a resolution regarding their patent dispute concerning electronic earbud technology. The agreement puts an end to the legal conflict between the two companies and ensures the protection of their intellectual property. This resolution is significant in the audio industry as it involves cutting-edge technology that impacts consumer electronics. The details of the settlement, including any financial compensation or licensing agreements, have not been disclosed to the public. However, this resolution marks a positive development in the ongoing efforts to protect innovation and intellectual property rights.
news.headline: Samsung and IngenioSpec reach settlement on earbud technology patent dispute in Waco, TX.

news.summary: Chewy Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) exceeded expectations in its latest quarter, reporting a first-quarter 2025 adjusted earnings of 35 cents per share, marking a 12.9% increase year-over-year. The online pet store also saw sales of $3.12 billion, an 8.3% increase compared to the previous year. The company foresees sales for fiscal year 2025 to range between $12.30 billion-$12.45 billion, with an adjusted EBITDA margin expectation of 5.4%-5.7%. Chewy is predicting second-quarter sales of $3.06 billion-$3.09 billion and adjusted earnings of 30-35 cents per share for the same period. Analysts are optimistic about Chewy's performance, indicating potential robust share gains. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Chewy (NYSE: CHWY) reports strong Q1 earnings, with adjusted EPS of 35 cents (up 12.9%), sales of $3.12 billion (up 8.3%), exceeding expectations. Fiscal year 2025 sales expected at $12.30 billion-$12.45 billion. Investors cautious despite outperformance against pet market peers.

news.summary: Dignify Therapeutics (Dignify), a company in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, specializing in developing pharmaceuticals and medical devices to help restore bowel and bladder control in elderly and neurologically impaired persons, disclosed on June 12, 2025, that Jeff Welch will be joining them.
news.headline: Dignify Therapeutics names Jeff Welch as COO, aiming to help elderly and neurologically impaired individuals regain bowel and bladder control.

news.summary: Stardock Entertainment has unveiled the v3.0 Hyperlane Update for Galactic Civilizations IV, a result of collating a year's worth of feedback, suggestions, and enhancements. This massive update, released in Plymouth, Michigan on June 12, 2025, integrates a plethora of improvements based on user input to enrich the gaming experience.
news.headline: Galactic Civilizations IV v3.0 update released by Stardock Entertainment after a year of feedback, with general improvements.

news.summary: Located in Sunnyvale, California, on June 12, 2025, SutiSoft is at the forefront of offering innovative cloud-based solutions that revolutionize business operations in the digital age. The company is thrilled to unveil significant upgrades to their electronic signature platform, SutiSign.
news.headline: SutiSoft introduces enhanced security features to eSignature platform SutiSign with 21 CFR Part 11 compliance.

news.summary: In New York on June 12, 2025, Antimetal revealed a $20 million Series A funding round, with Sound Ventures as the leading investor. This investment aims to address the significant issue of complexity in the modern stack. Antimetal also introduced the beta version of its main platform, which is created to streamline infrastructure processes.
news.headline: Antimetal secures $20M funding led by Sound Ventures to automate infrastructure management, tackling complexity in modern stack.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Los Angeles, an up-and-coming social media sensation named Semaj Xane, recognized for his engaging persona, popular online content, and expanding audience, has recently inked deals with Burke Entertainment Partners for representation and Formation Talent Agency for comprehensive services.
news.headline: 5-year-old social media star Semaj Xane signs with Burke Entertainment Partners for management and Formation Talent Agency for representation. Los Angeles, June 12, 2025.

news.summary: Reports indicate that workplace miscommunication is causing businesses to lose around $1.2 trillion each year, with social division currently reaching unprecedented levels. To address this issue, renowned author, communication specialist, and TEDx speaker Glodean Champion has launched The Process to LOVE™, a communication strategy aimed at promoting collaboration and understanding in professional environments.
news.headline: Glodean Champion's "The Process to LOVE™" aims to tackle $1.2 trillion workplace miscommunication issue.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Atlanta, Liquid Web, a renowned provider of VPS, WordPress, GPU, and dedicated hosting services for SMBs, unveiled its new Tech Habits Toolkit. This toolkit, offered for free, is a robust daily tracking system designed to assist entrepreneurs and digital professionals. With a focus on research-driven methods, this initiative aims to support individuals in improving their daily habits.
news.headline: Liquid Web releases free Tech Habits Toolkit based on study of high performers' digital behaviors, aiding SMBs.

news.summary: The President of the United States made personal appearances at the Bitcoin 2024 conference in Nashville and shared a video message with attendees at the Digital Asset Summit in New York City. The events drew large crowds, with the Bitcoin 2024 conference hosting over 5,000 attendees and the Digital Asset Summit in New York City attracting more than 3,000 participants. It was a notable moment as the President addressed the audience directly at these key gatherings focused on digital assets and cryptocurrencies.
news.headline: US president attends crypto events in Nashville and NYC, discusses plans for digital assets in video message.

news.summary: Queen Elizabeth officially starts her North American residency with voyages in Alaska. This is in preparation for her upcoming inaugural season of Caribbean voyages beginning in October. A ceremony involving a plaque and key marked her arrival in Seattle, where the Cunard ship will be homeporting from June onwards.
news.headline: Cunard's newly refreshed Queen Elizabeth arrives in Seattle for first time, setting sail on special Alaskan voyages before Caribbean season.

news.summary: A group of 76 healthcare workers in Massachusetts have recently become members of the Massachusetts Nurses Association. This decision was made in order to have a significant say in matters that affect patient care and working environments. The healthcare professionals from Holy Family Hospital in Methuen and Haverhill participated in a vote on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: 76 healthcare professionals at Holy Family Hospital have joined MNA to secure better patient care and professional respect.

news.summary: In June 12, 2025, in Kansas City, Missouri, C2FO, a leading on-demand working capital platform, is addressing the increasing need for quicker and cost-effective liquidity amid trade tariffs and economic unpredictability worldwide. Over the recent quarter, C2FO supplied $18 million in funding to support businesses grappling with these challenges.
news.headline: C2FO aids businesses with $18M liquidity during tariff disruptions, achieves record customer satisfaction amid global uncertainties.
34 counterparties take $181.417b at the Fed reverse repo operation.

news.summary: In its inaugural edition, the awards initiated by Mobile World Capital in partnership with B Lab Spain, GSMA Foundry, the State Secretariat for Digitalisation and Artificial Intelligence (SEDIA), and Red.es, attracted 157 submissions from 34 nations. The victorious initiatives hail from 6 different countries...
news.headline: MWCapital Awards honor impactful tech projects promoting sustainability. 157 entries from 34 countries, winners from 6 nations.

news.summary: In Reston, Virginia, as of June 12, 2025, Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) staff members work on resolving customers' complex issues in areas such as defense, homeland security, information technology, intelligence, health, and energy on a daily basis. During the upcoming summer in the United States, around 900 interns from 290 different colleges will join the company to gain experience and contribute to various projects.
news.headline: Leidos welcomes 900 interns from 290 colleges to tackle challenges in defense, homeland security, tech, health, energy.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2025, an inventor from Tabernacle, New Jersey, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the LIFTING LITTER. The inventor aimed to simplify the process of cleaning the litter box by eliminating the need to bend down to the ground. The innovative design provides additional assistance during cleaning and offers a more convenient solution to pet owners. The invention presents a viable alternative in the market, potentially shaping the future of pet care.
news.headline: Inventor from Tabernacle, NJ creates LIFTING LITTER platform (PLB-554) for easy litter box cleaning.

news.summary: A tech company based in New York named viaim, focusing on AI hardware and smart office products, has introduced its RecDot AI Voice Recorder Earbuds for sale on Amazon across North America. They are offering a special deal for a limited time where buyers can benefit from a $35 discount on RecDot earbuds and 15% off on NoteKit.
news.headline: viaim launches AI Office Solutions on Amazon with $35 off RecDot and 15% off NoteKit, limited-time deals.

news.summary: Covering 61,000 square feet, the recently opened store is set to cater to Chino Hills, the Inland Empire, and the wider Southern California region. Unveiled in June 12, 2025, by T&T Supermarket Inc., the largest Asian grocery retailer in Canada, this marks their second establishment in Southern California.
news.headline: T&T Supermarkets to open largest CA store in Chino Hills at 61,000 sq ft, serving Inland Empire and greater SoCal.

news.summary: In June 12, 2025, in Savannah, Georgia, Thomas Braziel recognized Bitcoin's potential beyond just a novel technology back in 2009. He identified a budding investment market that required institutional discipline. Over the following decade, Braziel took steps to capitalize on this opportunity and became a pioneer in this field, showcasing his forward-thinking approach.
news.headline: Thomas Braziel and 117 partners mark 10 years in distressed-crypto investing. Visionary Braziel turned Bitcoin into an institutional market.

news.summary: Embark on the colossal civilian-operated hospital ships and experience tales of kindness, bravery, and recovery along the coast of Africa. The Angel Guild, consisting of over one million members, has meticulously curated the film & TV content on Angel platform. The platform shared this news from Provo, Utah on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: Mercy Ships show to premiere on Angel.com and app. First 3 episodes free. Stories of compassion in coastal Africa. Utah, June 12, 2025.

news.summary: Construction Managers at CTA have been selected to construct the new Countryside Elementary School in Newton Highlands, Massachusetts. Situated in Newton Highlands, this project was awarded to CTA Construction Managers on June 12, 2025. This significant contract win represents another milestone for CTA, as they embark on building the new school for the community.
news.headline: CTA Construction Managers to build new Countryside Elementary School in Newton Highlands, MA. Awarded contract on June 12, 2025.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, the American Trucking Associations expressed gratitude towards President Trump for overturning California's harmful electric vehicle requirements. The organization also participated in a White House event celebrating this significant advancement towards establishing feasible regulations.
news.headline: ATA praises Trump for ending California's EV mandates. Calls it a significant step forward.

news.summary: DSC® is highlighting their innovative DREAMCELL® insoles designed to enhance athlete performance and aid in recovery. The company, a prominent player in performance foam production, is showing support by sponsoring the 17th Portland Track Festival on June 12, 2025. This sponsorship underscores DSC's commitment to the athletic community.
news.headline: DSC® sponsors 17th Annual Portland Track Festival, showcasing DREAMCELL®Insoles. Global leader in performance foam.

news.summary: A man was sentenced to life in prison for a kidnapping that resulted in death in Dallas on June 12, 2025. Rescue Hill, a non-profit organization focused on aiding victims of human trafficking, emphasizes the need for action to safeguard individuals and promote awareness. The organization offers secure environments and creative solutions to support those affected by this issue.
news.headline: Non-profit Rescue Hill helps trafficking victims; life sentence in kidnapping case. Urgent need to combat trafficking.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2025, an inventor from Standish, Maine, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the SLEEVELESS DOUBLE POCKET T. The inventor expressed the need for a practical solution to hold a cell phone while wearing a sleeveless T-shirt. The innovative shirt design features two pockets that allow users to securely store and access their phones while on the go.
news.headline: Inventor creates Sleeveless Double Pocket T-shirt to hold cell phone, providing convenience.

news.summary: VENU+, a prominent provider of guest services for busy retail and entertainment venues, has recently finalized a deal to sell its children's rides and prize assets located in malls across the United States. The agreement involves transferring more than 3,000 such assets to National Entertainment Network, LLC (NEN), a subsidiary of GENDA based in Colorado. These assets are currently operating in hundreds of malls nationwide.
news.headline: VENU+ sells 3,000+ children’s rides to GENDA's NEN in the U.S., enhancing entertainment solutions.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, the renowned video game commerce company Xsolla has revealed an important partnership with Defold, a highly utilized cross-platform game engine among professionals and indie developers globally. This venture brings forth an effortless integration between Xsolla and web games developed on Defold showcased on CrazyGames. This new integration offers developers a convenient method to monetize their games, coinciding with the upcoming CrazyGames x Defold Game Jam event scheduled to occur from June 13th to June 15th. This collaboration aims to simplify in-game monetization for developers involved in the event.
news.headline: Xsolla partners with Defold for in-game purchases, benefitting developers globally with easy monetization. Promoting CrazyGames x Defold Game Jam on June 13–15.

news.summary: Orlando-based FBC Mortgage, one of the top 10 national mortgage lenders, will undergo a rebranding as Acrisure Mortgage starting July 1, 2025. This decision signifies the company's integration with its parent company, Acrisure, a prominent global fintech entity operating in 23 countries and boasting over 19,000 employees. According to Greg Williams, Co-Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Acrisure, FBC Mortgage has been a crucial partner since it became part of the Acrisure group in 2022.
news.headline: FBC Mortgage to rebrand as Acrisure Mortgage; Acrisure Bounce House to replace FBC Mortgage Stadium in Orlando.

news.summary: A company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, known as Parallel Bio, has recently secured $21 million in Series A funding. They have successfully carried out their initial preclinical trial utilizing the immune organoid platform in collaboration with Centivax.
news.headline: Parallel Bio receives $21 million in Series A funding for human-first drug discovery, completes preclinical trial with Centivax.
